channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Rubbish collected around the back of Manley court and car parked illegally, 5th July
item.description:
Rubbish collected around the back and car parked illegally. Can't go take a photo cos group of men always around there smoking weed
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stoke Newington High Street, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped by the litter bin on Picardy Road Belvedere DA17 near the 401/469 Bus Stop, 5th July
item.description:
A bag of rubbish and an electric fan have been dumped by the litter bin on Picardy Road Belvedere DA17, approximately 25 metres from the junction with Halt Robin Road Belvedere. Would arrangements be put in place to remove the rubbish as soon as practical.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Picardy Road, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: ? Abandoned vehicle, 5th July
item.description:
Vehicle been here over 3 weeks full of personal items. Now wing mirror come off. Seems to have been left.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Old Farm Place, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Missing "Give Way" traffic sign at William Barefoot Drive Junction with Green Lane, 5th July
item.description:
Missing "Give Way" traffic sign at William Barefoot Drive Junction with Green Lane
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Green Lane, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mini roundabout repair / replacement / installation needed., 5th July
item.description:
Mini roundabout repair / replacement / installation needed.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Green Lane, Eltham

item.title: New traffic lights required for traffic control, 5th July
item.description:

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Green Lane, Eltham

item.title: Piles of wood dumped, 5th July
item.description:
Hi, a pile of wood has appeared next to the bins outside of the chilton grove flats, as seen in picture. Help would be appreciated in getting them removed. Many thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 70-136, Chilton Grove, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Silver Street, Enfield

item.title: Abandoned vehicle for weeks/months, 5th July
item.description:
Abandoned vehicle, smashed windows Tax runs out in August

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cambridge Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bins blocking street on red lines between swan and great dover, 5th July
item.description:
The bins are blocking the road for cyclists and are on double red lines
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Swan Street, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped carpets etc, 5th July
item.description:
Dumped household rubbish

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Evering Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Loud squeaky swing., 5th July
item.description:
The swing has been squeaking for a very long time (at least a year) and it seems to be getting louder. Very noisy in this hot weather when the swing is in constant use. It can be heard in nearby properties when windows are open and when in the garden.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stone Park Avenue, Eden Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 5th July
item.description:
Thank you!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 193, New Kent Road, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bike left outside my home, not in approved bay, 5th July
item.description:
One bike left outside 249/251 Elmers End Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 247+249, Elmers End Road, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Very large ivy tree in betts park overhanging into garden, 5th July
item.description:
Our garden wall backs onto Betts Park and there is a very large ivy bush/tree that overhangs our garden wall and blocks the light into our property, as it is not on our property we can't remove it but would like it maintained/pruned or removed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 7, Cranleigh Close, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti sprayed on the base of a black shop shutter. The shop is Shapes Barbers 306 Brixton road, SW9 6AE., 5th July
item.description:
I like to report graffiti sprayed on the base of a black shop shutter. The shop is Shapes Barber shop 306 Brixton road SW9 6AE. The graffiti has been there approximately over two weeks. Please can you remove it.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 308,310,312, Brixton Road, Brixton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pavement/walkway is breaking up., 5th July
item.description:
The pavement is breaking up and causing a very uneven walking surface and trip hazard, and a loose/detached area. Which over time is getting worse.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 26, Stone Road, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter, weeds and cigarette butts need clearing, 5th July
item.description:
The walkway of Battersea Bridge is littered and hasn't been properly swept for ages. The cigarette butts are piling up among the weeds and are never swept. There is litter including broken glass on the pavement. The bridge always has a litter problem and is seemingly ignored. Please clean.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Battersea Bridge Road, Chelsea, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
